system.description:
### Tier 2 Exploration / Horror A ship adrift in deep space, with no gravity and no atmosphere, infested with Husks or rogue VIs. Impulses: Drifting into the void, flickering lights, the sound of metal groaning.

#### Features Zero-G Combat - Passive: Movement is handled by pushing off surfaces. PCs have Advantage on Agility rolls to maneuver or dodge, but Disadvantage on Strength rolls for melee or physical force.

How do you stabilize your aim while floating? What happens when you push off a wall too hard?

Oxygen Reserve - Countdown: Setup a Dynamic Countdown (8) named "Oxygen." When the countdown triggers, the air is gone; every PC must mark 1 HP when they gain a Spotlight until they restore life support.

Does the air taste metallic before it runs out? Is there a frantic scramble for the last remaining emergency canisters?

Life Support Breach - Action: Spend a Fear. An explosion or hull breach creates a vacuum. All PCs and adversaries within a zone must make a Strength Reaction Roll (15). On a failure, they are pulled toward the breach and become Restrained as they cling to the environment for dear life.

What piece of the ship just blew out into the stars? Can you seal the door before everyone is sucked out? }}
